message:
fix(layout,runtime,widgets): fix flex gap alignment, fairness guard, input selection, list caching, and textarea allocations

- Layout: account for explicit gap spacing in SpaceBetween/SpaceAround
  leftover computation so items no longer overlap when both alignment
  and gap are set; add missing hash fields in cache test helper
- Runtime: only trigger fairness intervention when resize time actually
  exceeds input time, preventing false-positive throttling
- Widgets/input: consolidate delete_selection() into insert_text() and
  insert_char() to avoid missed or double deletions on selection
- Widgets/list: add data_hash-based caching of filtered display indices
  on ListState to skip O(N) string filtering on unchanged frames
- Widgets/textarea: borrow line text in WrappedSlice (&str) instead of
  cloning into owned Strings, eliminating per-slice allocations during
  line wrapping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

             area_width: w,
             area_height: 24,
             constraints_hash: 42,
